title: Pooled sample testing (VTM/UTM) for SARS-CoV-2 using Magnetic Nanotrap® particles for direct RNA extraction.

steps: Pool 8 clinical VTM / UTM samples. Combine 500 µL from each sample into a 5 mL or 15 mL tube.
Add 300 µL of Magnetic Nanotrap ® particles to the sample.
Incubate samples with Magnetic Nanotrap ® particles at Room temperature for 00:10:00
Use a magnetic rack to separate the Magnetic Nanotrap ® particles from the sample. 00:01:00
Discard the supernatant carefully without disturbing the pellet.
Add 500 µL of 1X PBS to the pellet and resuspend to wash.
Use a magnetic rack to separate the Magnetic Nanotrap ® particles from the sample. 00:01:00
Discard the supernatant carefully without disturbing the pellet. If required - use a smaller pipette to remove any residual PBS.
Resuspend particle pellet in 50 µL of extraction buffer (Quick vortex if required).
Heat samples at 95 °C for 00:05:00 This step can be performed on a heat block or thermocycler.
Transfer the resuspension mix to a 0.5 mL OR 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube. Do not heat samples in a 5 mL or larger tube. The heat distribution required for lysis is not adequate in larger tube sizes.
Use a magnetic rack to separate the Magnetic Nanotrap ® particles from the sample. 00:01:00
Collect the supernatant. The sample is ready for analysis.
Use any SARS-CoV-2 RT-PCR detection kit. Follow manufacturer instructions to set up the RT- PCR
creator: Anurag Patnaik
